UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PETITIONER MOSSER COMPANIES NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINSTATIVE MANDAMUS AND COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 20, 2013. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus And Complaint For Declaratory Relief.
Off Calendar Dec-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Attorney David Wasserman for Mosser Companies the Petitioner /Attorney Wayne K. Snodgrass for San Francisco Residential Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Board the Respondent.

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus And Complaint For Declaratory Relief is DENIED. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Reporter Tamera Willat-Harrison, CSR#4609, (415)272-1753. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Adminstative Mandamus And Complaint For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Nov-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER MOSSER COMPANIES Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Adminstative Mandamus And Complaint For Declaratory Relief is Continued to December 20, 2013. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than November 27, 2013. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
